references.label: KayKit Medieval Hexagon FREE
references.purpose: FREE source pack for guide extraction, generated assets, and manifest audits.

references.label: KayKit Medieval Hexagon EXTRA
references.purpose: Purchased local-only EXTRA pack for category and guide visual coverage.

references.label: Kenney Castle Kit
references.purpose: Third-party compatibility fixture for non-hex props, structures, and warnings.

references.label: KayKit Adventurers FREE
references.purpose: Animated actor fixture for facing, spawn, and SimpleRPG local-asset coverage.

packageChecks.label: pnpm lint
packageChecks.summary: Biome lint over src/, tests/, scripts/, and docs-site/.

packageChecks.label: pnpm typecheck
packageChecks.summary: Strict TypeScript validation for runtime, tests, scripts, and examples.

packageChecks.label: pnpm build
packageChecks.summary: tsup multi-entry ESM build — chunks + DTS + CLI shebang + asset copies.

packageChecks.label: pnpm test
packageChecks.summary: Full vitest suite — unit + integration + contract specs (the migrated former scripts/audit-*.ts checks).

packageChecks.label: pnpm test:coverage:enforce
packageChecks.summary: vitest with v8 coverage gated against the ratchet thresholds in vitest.coverage.shared.ts.

packageChecks.label: pnpm test:browser:free
packageChecks.summary: vitest-browser FREE-pack visual snapshot suite against bootstrap-fetched KayKit GLTFs under Chromium.

packageChecks.label: pnpm docs-site:build
packageChecks.summary: Astro Starlight docs site build — emits 1100+ pages, validates typedoc-generated reference + every hand-written guide.

packageChecks.label: npm pack --dry-run
packageChecks.summary: Release-time tarball dry run — emits the publish whitelist + asset inclusion bounds for the published package contract.
